description: One paired set linked by a cross-prefix dep where the mirror (bd-zsy8) has drifted on status (open→closed), priority (0→2), and closed_open (open→closed). Titles also differ, but v2 intentionally drops 'title' from the drift enum (no-signal on real corpus per bt-gkyn) — the expected drift list is exactly [status, priority, closed_open].
